channel.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário

item.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário
item.description:
🚨 Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica
Visão geral:
• 0 com severidade Crítica
• 9 com severidade Alta
• 3 novas CVEs
• 4 novos advisories/exploits

────────────────────────────────────
Infraestrutura - Docker / ESX / Elastic / Grafana / Nginx / VMware / Zabbix

🚨 CVE-2025-10461 - Docker
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Docker
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Global file reads caused by improper URL checks in webserver in Softing Industrial Automation GmbH smartLinks on docker (filesystem modules) allows file access. This issue affects smartLink SW-HT: through 1.42 smartLink SW-PN: through 1.03.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2025-10461
 
────────────────────────────────────
Segurança - Acronis / Axur / Check Point / Harmony SASE / Qualys / SentinelOne

🚨 CVE-2026-32614 - Check Point
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Check Point
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 7.5
Resumo:
Go ShangMi (Commercial Cryptography) Library (GMSM) is a cryptographic library that covers the Chinese commercial cryptographic public algorithms SM2/SM3/SM4/SM9/ZUC. Prior to 0.41.1, the current SM9 decryption implementation contains an infinity-point ciphertext forgery vulnerability. The root cause is that, during decryption, the elliptic-curve point C1 in the ciphertext is only deserialized and checked to be on th...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-32614
 
💣 ClickFix Campaigns Spread MacSync macOS Infostealer via Fake AI Tool Installers
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Three different ClickFix campaigns have been found to act as a delivery vector for the deployment of a macOS information stealer called MacSync. "Unlike traditional exploit-based attacks, this method relies entirely on user interaction – usually in the form of copying and executing commands – making it particularly effective against users who may not appreciate the implications of running
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/03/clickfix-campaigns-spread-macsync-macos.html
 
📢 Check Point launches AI advisory service as adoption outpaces governance - ITWeb
 
Criticidade: Baixa
Ferramenta: Check Point
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A matéria apresenta um advisory de segurança relacionado a Check Point, com informações úteis para avaliação de risco e eventual atualização.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMivgFBVV95cUxQOEJRLUYtSUtLUWhucGZPRzZUUG8xZGdEOVQyNkl1cWxweG53bzFrN0hLdU16UUZJcVhjSEkxNFRuaWx6ZVE3ZzFmdVNmeHh3bnAtM0NjeVFiampKRjl5UnVDS3VFOV8tbE1KVXpaTkU1Q2dJYmRRaFJ6SUx5cU1lQUhFTGpSdzdHZW1GN2oyd2thWmJKSW5lZ3c0TEVuR0JsWHp4dUV5YXVkeG5DVVcycjhSaXlUWkU0ZEZ4Y0pn?oc=5
 
📰 DRILLAPP Backdoor Targets Ukraine, Abuses Microsoft Edge Debugging for Stealth Espionage
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Ukrainian entities have emerged as the target of a new campaign likely orchestrated by threat actors linked to Russia, according to a report from S2 Grupo's LAB52 threat intelligence team. The campaign, observed in February 2026, has been assessed to share overlaps with a prior campaign mounted by Laundry Bear (aka UAC-0190 or Void Blizzard) aimed at Ukrainian defense forces with a malware
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/03/drillapp-backdoor-targets-ukraine.html
 
📰 Microsoft releases Windows 11 OOB hotpatch to fix RRAS RCE flaw
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Microsoft has released an out-of-band (OOB) update to fix a security vulnerabilities affecting Windows 11 Enterprise devices that receive hotpatch updates instead of the regular Patch Tuesday cumulative updates.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/microsoft/microsoft-releases-windows-11-oob-hotpatch-to-fix-rras-rce-flaw/
 
📰 Why Security Validation Is Becoming Agentic
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
If you run security at any reasonably complex organization, your validation stack probably looks something like this: a BAS tool in one corner. A pentest engagement, or maybe an automated pentesting product, in another. A vulnerability scanner feeding an attack surface management platform somewhere else.
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/03/why-security-validation-is-becoming.html
 
📰 Betterleaks, a new open-source secrets scanner to replace Gitleaks
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A new open-source tool called Betterleaks can scan directories, files, and git repositories and identify valid secrets using default or customized rules.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/betterleaks-a-new-open-source-secrets-scanner-to-replace-gitleaks/
 
📰 Four People Arrested During Lake Elsinore DUI Checkpoint - Patch
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Check Point
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A notícia aborda atualização ou correção de segurança associada a Check Point, o que pode exigir validação e aplicação no ambiente.
Link: https://news.google.?oc=5
 
────────────────────────────────────
Sistemas / Cloud - 1Password / Azure / Office / Ubuntu / Windows Server / WordPress

🚨 CVE-2026-1870 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 5.3
Resumo:
The Thim Kit for Elementor – Pre-built Templates & Widgets for Elementor plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to unauthorized access of data due to a missing validation checks on the 'thim-ekit/archive-course/get-courses' REST endpoint callback function in all versions up to, and including, 1.3.7. This makes it possible for unauthenticated attackers to disclose private or draft LearnPress course content by supplying po...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-1870
 
💣 Attackers Exploit Teams, Quick Assist to Deploy Stealthy A0Backdoor - gbhackers.com
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Office
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A matéria descreve o uso de Microsoft Teams e Quick Assist como vetores para entrega de malware em ambiente corporativo, indicando risco para estações de trabalho e suporte remoto.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiVEFVX3lxTE5leWNKa3BlQ1ZZMHRyN2tqc2FzeHhBSkJoa1YyZlBvY3hSM2o2RlVfVTNHOTVVMk10T1M4MjE1NDFrQkpCWnpJTlQwZDVTRjlJbTAtdQ?oc=5
 
💣 Don't panic over new Linux exploits: How to check if your PC is affected in under 5 minutes - How-To Geek
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Don't panic over new Linux exploits: How to check if your PC is affected in under 5 minutes
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMijwFBVV95cUxNMDlxUXprSEo0TlMxY0NwaGlXaGZxeGZjVGZtM28xNXVibE5haUFQaFJIRDA0aHFmd1pjMEpuVnl0c3FwVGFicjZMMGpYTnYyN3h5SGlVNUh0TTZrNTNDeG40Sko2dXh2ZlhucWdoWmVoa2VzSTVkdy1KOU13OGs2NURyVXhkcmUwRkxaLVk2cw?oc=5
 
📰 Microsoft to Block Windows 11 and Server 2025 Automated Installation After Critical RCE Vulnerability - CybersecurityNews
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Windows Server
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Microsoft to Block Windows 11 and Server 2025 Automated Installation After Critical RCE Vulnerability
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMihwFBVV95cUxPcUR6TUpTNTVQWDlDVVZGNHlTQjlPd1hGdnlHOVNoNmk3czZESnB3RzNKLVFqUFQ0dlNoUm5rX1NWWkN3RGc3WEg3dUNmbU45cHdFX0RuM3VZV2JSdnl2WEU4Y0taZWJSRVBBeVVkNXh4N0UtbjItVUZQOGNtYjVYRU1qYmJXOTA?oc=5
 
────────────────────────────────────
Período: Notícias do período de 14/03/2026 até 16/03/2026.
